title: Pachypleurum condensatum
taxonomy: Pachypleurum condensatum is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is native to China and is classified as a member of the genus Pachypleurum. The classification of Pachypleurum condensatum places it within the order Apiales and the class Magnoliopsida. Further classification includes its family, Apiaceae, and its order, Apiales, which also includes other plants such as angelica and carrots. Pachypleurum condensatum's classification is a key aspect of understanding its evolutionary history and relationships with other plants.
